linuxPackagedSmokePrereq0: On Linux: npm run build && npm run pack:linux:dir, then npm run verify:linux-unpacked (bundled engines in bin/ may be filled before release).
linuxPackagedSmokePrereq1: Folder dist/linux-unpacked/ with fluxalloy or FluxAlloy and resources/bin/{yt-dlp,ffmpeg,ffprobe}.
linuxPackagedSmokePrereq2: Clean userData profile (first launch) or intentional test over an existing profile.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_launch: Run dist/linux-unpacked/fluxalloy or FluxAlloy (not npm run dev).
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_engines: Status bar: yt-dlp / ffmpeg / ffprobe versions with no “not found” errors.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_open_file: Editor: open a local MP4/MKV; preview plays and scrub works.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_ytdlp: Downloads: short URL (10–30 s), queue reaches Done, log has no ERROR.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_editor_from_dl: From queue/history: Open in editor for a finished file.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_export: MP4 segment export (libx264) completes without error.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_knowledge: Knowledge base: open an article; internal .md link works.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_support_zip: About → Support ZIP: archive is created; no secrets in the text.
linuxPackagedSmokeStep_settings: Settings → Dependencies: engine paths point at resources/bin.
linuxPackagedSmokePass0: No crash when closing the main window and relaunching the binary.
linuxPackagedSmokePass1: Download progress column shows labels during post-processing merge/embed.
linuxPackagedSmokePass2: userData/logs have no tokens/passwords; dist/ artifacts have no .env.
